introline: Every failure mode, every rail, every edge case — deterministic and replayable.

scenarios.title: Payment succeeds immediately
scenarios.description: Clean first-attempt success on Visa HDFC.

scenarios.title: Card declines → UPI fallback wins
scenarios.description: Simulate the classic routing save. 2.8s total latency.

scenarios.title: ACH timeout → SEPA Instant fallback
scenarios.description: Cross-border fallback path with 6.1s total latency.

scenarios.title: All rails decline
scenarios.description: Stolen card on a blocked BIN. Every fallback refuses.

scenarios.title: 05 — do not honor
scenarios.description: Bank rejects without reason. Most common decline in production.

scenarios.title: Velocity anomaly
scenarios.description: Simulate 4 attempts from one device in 2 minutes.

scenarios.title: Card enumeration
scenarios.description: Different cards, same device, same BIN.

scenarios.title: First-time high-value
scenarios.description: New customer (7-day account) attempting 3× average ticket.

scenarios.title: payment.routed
scenarios.description: Fired when routing fallback is used.

scenarios.title: Webhook retry cascade
scenarios.description: Your endpoint returns 500; we retry at 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 4h.

scenarios.title: Signature verification fail
scenarios.description: Webhook sent with intentionally wrong signature.

scenarios.title: Normal T+1 settlement
scenarios.description: Standard NEFT settlement, arrives 06:30 next day.

scenarios.title: Settlement fails (IFSC mismatch)
scenarios.description: RTGS rejected by beneficiary bank. Triggers retry flow.

scenarios.title: Split settlement
scenarios.description: Funds split across two accounts by pre-configured rule.

replay.hint: Every scenario is deterministic. Same trigger = same response, every time.
